title: Complex punctuation prose
description: Mixed punctuation — semicolons, dashes, parentheses at speed
text: The proposal had three goals: reduce costs (by 15%), improve reliability — measured by uptime — and grow the user base; together, these would set the company up for a strong second half. The plan was bold but realistic.
tips: Semicolons + em-dashes + parens = pro writing toolkit
Each mark has its rhythm — semis are sharper, dashes wider
Don't over-think — type, then read for sense

character_tips.anna: Complex punctuation separates beginner from pro. Drill until automatic.
character_tips.maxim: Real reports use all of these. Master them = master business writing.
character_tips.knopych: PUNCTUATION ZOO! 🎢 Semicolons, dashes, parens — all in one!
character_tips.klavochka: Sophisticated writing, my treasure — like a fine dinner 🍽️
